titleUa: Пакет інтер'єру Шкіра для Mercedes – R 232 – AMG SL 63
titleEn: Leather Interior for Mercedes – R 232 – AMG SL 63
longDescEn: Your personal 1-Second-Wow: The BRABUS Masterpiece Interior includes a fully equipped leather/alcantara interior with individual leather, pipings and quiltings and consists of: Two front seats incl. headrests, back and side panels in leather Steering wheel and steering wheel airbag in leather Dashboard upper and lower part incl. glove box cover in leather Middle console incl. armrest in leather Two Door panels incl. armrests and storage compartments in leather Rear and sill trim incl. storage compartments in leather Convertible top cover incl. cover flaps in leather A-pillars and headliner incl. sun visors in leather Two floor mats leather quilted with BRABUS badges Trunk mat quilted leather with BRABUS badge You have a question? Feel free to contact us! We look forward to your message Signature Carbon package interior For Your High-Performance Experience! Thank you for your interestContact us! Be part of the BRABUS community and subscribe to the newsletter now!
bodyHtmlEn:
Your personal 1-Second-Wow: The BRABUS Masterpiece Interior includes a fully equipped leather/alcantara interior with individual leather, pipings and quiltings and consists of:

Two front seats incl. headrests, back and side panels in leather

Steering wheel and steering wheel airbag in leather

Dashboard upper and lower part incl. glove box cover in leather

Middle console incl. armrest in leather

Two Door panels incl. armrests and storage compartments in leather

Rear and sill trim incl. storage compartments in leather

Convertible top cover incl. cover flaps in leather

A-pillars and headliner incl. sun visors in leather

Two floor mats leather quilted with BRABUS badges

Trunk mat quilted leather with BRABUS badge

You have a question? Feel free to contact us!

We look forward to your message

Signature Carbon package interior

For Your High-Performance Experience!

Thank you for your interestContact us!

Be part of the BRABUS community and subscribe to the newsletter now!
seoDescriptionUa: Пакет інтер'єру Шкіра — преміум тюнінг BRABUS для SL-Klasse
seoDescriptionEn: Interior Package Leather — premium BRABUS tuning for SL-Klasse
